faqs.question: How much does rat extermination cost in Bayonne, NJ?
faqs.answer: Rat extermination services in Bayonne typically range from $350 to $600 depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.answer: Our comprehensive approach includes thorough property inspection, strategic trap placement, rodenticide application in secure bait stations, entry point sealing, sanitation recommendations, and follow-up visits.
